reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction. The tests rely on exact string matching (import route from ./tools/route, RouteEntry, name: route, etc.) and text presence checks rather than runtime behavior testing. The instruction has solution leakage which could be fixed, but the fundamental test issues (solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, test_not_tautological) require test file changes which are not permitted.
